hypertrophy.reasoning: Address posterior chain imbalances and antagonists to heavy pressing/pulling without fatiguing already-taxed upper body.

siri_text: Tuesday's workout. Strength: Paused Bench Press, 5 by 6 at 50 percent. Strength: Bent Over Row, 1 by 8. Strength: DB Chest Fly, 3 by 10. Strength: Lat Pulldown, 3 by 10. Strength: Tricep Extension, 3 by 10. Metcon: For Time, 15 min cap: 6-8-10-8-6, Pull Up. For hypertrophy, focus on rear deltoids, biceps, lower back.
